---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Estormi
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is missing or frustrating today?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, related issues, prior art in other tools.
